study_title: Exoskeleton development comparison between three bees species: Apis mellifera, Frieseomelitta varia and Centri analis
exp_title: RNA-seq raw reads of bees: Apis mellifera PBM phase
design: Sequencing was performed in the Central Laboratory of High Performance Technologies (LaCTAD) facility. The libraries were prepared using the  Illumina TruSeq RNA Sample Preparation Kit v2, where Oligo-dT beads are used to capture polyA tails. The layout was paired-end (2x100 base pairs), with six libraries per lane.
center: Hospital de Clinicas de Porto Alegre

study_title: Transcriptional responses in honey bee larvae infected with chalkbrood fungus
exp_title: RNA-Seq of Apis mellifera: hemolymph in experiment group  of C/C genotype 3
design: the mRNAs were enriched using the oligo(dT) magnetic beads, fragmented into short pieces (about 300 nt) by NEBNext UltraTM RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina (NEB, USA), and then cDNAs were synthesized by random hexamer primer and M-MuLV Reverse Transcriptase(RNase H-). Finally, sequencing adaptors were ligated to the cDNA fragments by PCR amplication.
sample_description: the hemolymph of C/C larvae from treatment group
